Stay Updated

Tell us your dream cruise and get a personalized quote.

All prices are in Canadian dollars (CAD), shown as "from" price per person based on double occupancy, and are subject to change without notice. Prices reflect cruise fare only and do not include airfare or gratuities unless otherwise stated. Taxes and port fees are included. Availability is not guaranteed. Only a written quote provided directly by Lido Travel constitutes a confirmed price. Lido Travel acts as an independent travel agent. We recommend purchasing travel insurance. All bookings are subject to the terms and conditions of the applicable cruise line.
